metadata.description: Kanban board for Password Reset and Recovery Flow. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task and 2 broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units).

tasks.title: Password Reset and Recovery Flow
tasks.description: Implement password reset functionality using Azure AD B2C password reset user flow with email-based recovery.
tasks.userStory: As a user, I want to reset my password when I forget it so that I can regain access to my account without contacting support.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user clicks 'Forgot Password', when they enter their registered email, then they receive a password reset email
Given a user receives a password reset email, when they click the reset link, then they are directed to a secure password reset page
Given a user is on the password reset page, when they enter a new password that meets requirements, then their password is updated and they can log in
Given a user attempts to use an expired password reset link, when they try to reset, then they receive an error message and must request a new reset link
Given a user requests password reset, when the email is not registered, then they receive a generic success message (for security, don't reveal if email exists)
tasks.businessValue: Reduces support burden and improves user experience by allowing self-service password recovery.
tasks.technicalNotes: Uses Azure AD B2C password reset user flow. Reset links must expire after 1 hour. Tokens must be single-use.
successMetrics: Password reset success rate: 85%+ of reset requests result in successful password change
Support tickets for password issues: <5% of total support tickets
businessRules: Password reset links expire after 1 hour
Reset links can only be used once
New password must meet same requirements as initial password
Users cannot reuse their last 3 passwords
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks below break this down into 1-2 day units.

tasks.title: Password Reset Request Endpoint
tasks.description: Create endpoint that accepts email and triggers password reset flow via Azure AD B2C.
tasks.userStory: As a developer, I want a password reset endpoint so that users can request password resets.
acceptanceCriteria: Given password reset request, when email is provided, then reset flow is initiated via B2C
Given reset request, when processed, then user receives password reset email from B2C
Given reset request, when email doesn't exist, then generic success message is returned (security)
Given rate limiting, when too many requests, then rate limit error is returned
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Azure AD B2C password reset user flow. Implement rate limiting. Return generic response.
businessRules: Max 5 reset requests per hour per email
Generic response for security (don't reveal if email exists)

tasks.title: Password Reset Completion Flow
tasks.description: Handle password reset completion when user clicks reset link and sets new password.
tasks.userStory: As a developer, I want to handle password reset completion so that users can set new passwords.
acceptanceCriteria: Given reset link, when clicked, then user is directed to B2C password reset page
Given new password, when set, then password is validated against requirements
Given password reset, when completed, then user can log in with new password
Given reset link, when expired, then user is informed and can request new reset
tasks.technicalNotes: Use B2C password reset user flow. Handle redirects. Validate password requirements.
successMetrics: 100% of valid reset links allow password change
businessRules: New password must meet same requirements as initial password
